## IMQ\_LOG\_TIME\_FORMAT variable

Environment variable IMQ\_LOG\_TIME\_FORMAT=\[ 'microseconds', 'milliseconds', 'seconds' \]. Specifies profiled time logging format, by default is 'microseconds'

 {<!-- -->AllowedTimeFormat \| string<!-- -->}

**Signature:**

```typescript
IMQ_LOG_TIME_FORMAT: AllowedTimeFormat
```
